titleStmt.title: SII 41.443: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 443. (A.R. No. 658 of 1905.) Tīrttamalai, Harur Taluk, Salem District. On the north and west walls of the central shrine in the Tirthagirisvara temple on the hill at Tirthamalai

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Vijaya Bhūpatirāya, Śaka 1331, Virōti, Makara, Purva 14, Monday, Punarpūsam = 1409, January 20.

summary.p: Mentions that somebody (name lost) renovated the dilapidated tann in Ēḻūrpāḍi, a tirunāmattukkāṇi village of the temple of Tīrttamalai and in appreciation of that he was given some land free of taxes. Tīrttamalai was in Kūḍal-paṟṟu in Puṟamalai-nadu in Nigarili-Chōḻa-maṇḍalam on the south bank of the river Peṇṇai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . man makāmaṇṭalicuraṉ Arirāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarā
yarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ śrīvīradevarāyaṉ kumārar vijayabhūpatirā
yaṉpradhivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāṉiṉṟa śakābtam 1000 3 100 3 10 1 Itaṉmeṟcellāni
ṉṟa viroti samvatsarattu makara nāyaṟṟupūrvva pakṣattu śaturddaśiyum tiṅka
ṭ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ nikarilicoḻamaṇṭalattu peṇṇaikku teṉkarai Aru
malai cūḻnta puṟamalaināṭṭuk kūṭalpaṟṟu nāyinār tirttamalai nāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa Ēḻūrpāṭiyil Eri
nerāka yiṭintuk kiṭakkaiyil muṉṉāḷ vāṅkapperum ta yum yum yilu tāmu maṇ
ṭapamum camaipittuc ceykaiyil Inta vāṅkapperum ṭayavar tiruvāyil ka Ivvāykā
ppaḷḷattukku mel karaiyiliṭai vūr kiḻ karai yinta nilattil sarvamānya Iṟaiyilili Āka yiṭṭa kuḻi 7 100intak kuḻi Eḻunūṟum Ivar
sarvamānyaiṟaiili Āka cantirātitta varaiyum naṭatta kaṭavatu Ākavum Itu māṟiṉār Uṇṭāṉāl keṅkaik karai
cuvaik koṉṟāṉ paṇṇiṉa pāpam paṇṇakkaṭavaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 41.443 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
